revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-2-265

Alternative term: Safety valve

A device that allows air (or other gas) under pressure to escape to the atmosphere, when the pressure exceeds a given value. The device is controlled by either a spring or a weight.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Pressure-relief valve}}
